evidence.text:
We are here to assist you
OCEAN LINK GLOBAL (OLG)
Located in the heart of Casablanca area, OceanLink Global was established in 2016.
We first specialized our activity at import for our valued customers acting in ready-to-wear and fashion accessories industries and coordinated their deliveries in Casablanca.
Our willingness to develop our activity has led us to develop our export business very quickly. Our goal is being a major actor in the freight forwarding sector.

Does it really mater what estate agency you have now that everything is listed on Rightmove? Yes it does. You need an Agency that has good local knowledge and understanding. Winkworth understand the local market and provide excellent guidance for both sellers and buyers alike. Highly recommended.
Petersfield Reviews:

We had a protracted period of trying to sell 3 properties over nearly 2 years (as part of probate sale) and despite many complications that those properties presented, Harry and Andrew were extremely efficient and helpful. Making the process very personal whilst still professional.
Northampton Reviews:
By Shan on 12/4/2026
★★★★★
I recently rented my property through Winkworth and the experience was absolutely seamless from start to finish. Hassle-free, straightforward, and they made the whole process incredibly simple — exactly what you want as a landlord. Throughout every stage, they were thorough, on the mark, and gave me complete peace of mind with no worries whatsoever. Natasha and Ian are a brilliant team — always willing to help, always one step ahead, and nothing is ever too much trouble. The quality of service is second to none and I would not hesitate for a single moment to appoint them as my agents again. If you're looking for agents you can truly rely on, look no further. Highly recommended!
West End Reviews:
By Upload on 31/3/2026
★★★★★
Katerina managed the property I rented for five and a half years and was consistently professional throughout. She always responded promptly and handled any issues without unnecessary delays. Every maintenance matter I raised was resolved efficiently — including more complex cases where quotes for works had to be obtained and coordinated, which she managed smoothly and without any hassle on my part. Katerina also acted as a great mediator between me and the landlord, handling sensitive situations with care and fairness. My overall experience was very positive and I would not hesitate to recommend her.
Fulham & Parsons Green Reviews:
By Sarah Queralt on 19/1/2026
★★★★★
Faith and the team at Winkworth were a dream to work with on the sale of my property. I was updated throughout the process with clear communication and provided advice and support all the way through. Wholly trustworthy and go over and above to make it as pain free as possible. Delighted with with the sale and highly recommend Winkworth.... a service that makes you feel special.
Marylebone & Mayfair Reviews:
By Z L on 23/1/2026
★★★★★
We recently purchased a property with David (and Charlie) as FTB, and they were both an absolute pleasure to work with. David was incredibly easy to communicate with and always available, happily accommodating multiple on-site visits and taking the time to walk us through everything. I particularly appreciate how smooth and transparent David made the offer and negotiation process. He explained each step clearly, set expectations upfront, and made what could have been a stressful experience feel calm and manageable. He was also exceptionally patient and supportive — even waiting with me for a long time when the gas certification technician was running late. We felt genuinely supported throughout the entire journey and never rushed or pressured. Highly recommend David (and Charlie) to anyone looking for a knowledgeable, reliable, and thoughtful property purchase agent.

evidence.page_title: Viral Photo Shows Mostly Maskless Crowd at Lollapalooza 2021
evidence.title: A photo showing the mostly maskless crowd at Lollapalooza 2021 is being compared to 'Where's Waldo'
evidence.description: "If anyone had offered me free tickets, I would have taken a hard pass on it," Colin Hinkle, the photographer who captured the moment, said.
evidence.text:
- Lollapalooza took place over the weekend, and one aerial photo is going viral.
- The image shows a tightly packed sea of concertgoers with very few attendees wearing masks.
- Festival organizers required full vaccination or a negative COVID-19 test for entry.
- See more stories on Insider's business page.
The Lollapalooza music festival took place in Chicago over the weekend, but one photo showing a sea of tightly packed, mostly maskless concertgoers quickly began making the rounds on social media.
The festival organizers had an entry protocol that required attendees to bring printed proof of their vaccination status or a negative COVID-19 test. Unvaccinated attendees were required to wear a mask during their time at the festival.
Insider spoke with Colin Hinkle, the photographer who captured the image, to get the story behind the photo.
Interview edited and condensed for clarity.
What kind of photography do you do?
My primary job is an aerial photographer, so I use drones or helicopters to gather video or photos from above.
What is your relationship to the Lollapalooza festival?
That's actually shot off the balcony of where I live. I live in a 52nd floor of a building that faces Grant Park and directly over top of Lollapalooza. Every year, I usually am around that weekend, and I get a camera with a long zoom lens on it, and I take photos and share them.
What caught your eye about the photo this time around?
What I wanted to try to capture this year was while they have all their restrictions in place for this event, I knew that a large group of people in one space was kind of contradicting all of the rules and regulations that were being told. … I wanted to try to show how many people were in one space at one time there, so I was trying to get a shot, as many as I could, showing the massive crowds all compacted together in very tight spaces.
—Colin Hinkle (@hinklecolin) July 31, 2021
You shared the photo on Twitter. What were some of your favorite reactions to it?
Everyone's referring to it as "Where's Waldo." I hadn't thought about that, but it makes sense. With the high resolution — I shot it in 60 megapixels, so in the original image, you can literally zoom in and see individual faces.
What was the mood over the course the weekend?
It seemed like the crowds were kind of gravitating toward certain areas instead of spreading out across multiple stages. … It definitely seemed like this year, the crowds were compiling into a tighter area even more. The crowd for Post Malone was larger than what I had seen at the Cubs' World Series event a couple of years ago in Grant Park. It was massive.
Did you feel safe with the gathering?
I'll put it this way: If anyone had offered me free tickets, I would have taken a hard pass on it.
image_captions: An aerial photo of the crowd at Lollapalooza 2021
A person wearing a mask and a couple kissing at Lollapalooza 2021
